title: Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|The Hunt for Han Solo}} {{Book |image=[[File:Missions5.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Missions 5:
The Hunt for Han Solo'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[January]] [[1998]]''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=80 |isbn=9780590127974 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]The events of ''The Hunt for Han Solo'' take place a "few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]]" after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] gamebook written by [[Dave Wolverton]]. It is the fifth volume of the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' series, and it was published by [[Scholastic]] on [[January]] [[1998]]. A sequel, [[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt|''The Search for Grubba the Hutt'']], was published the following [[February|month]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''You are a bounty hunter.'' ''Your target is Han Solo. Both Jabba the Hutt and the Empire want him – dead or alive. He is on his way to Tatooine to deliver something very important to Jabba. You must reach him first. Your mission: to hunt down Han Solo before he gets away.'' ''Good luck.'' ==Plot summary== While trying to spend a peaceful night at the [[Restful Nights Hotel]] on [[Faldos]], Han Solo is ambushed by several bounty hunters. He escapes, and in the process, rescues young [[Grubba Desilijic Aarrpo]] from a pair of [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] slavers. Safely aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], Solo learns that Jabba Desilijic Tiure is Grubba's Ur-Damo. Meanwhile on Tatooine, Prefect [[Eugene Talmont]] hatches a scheme with [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], [[Udin]], and [[Eron Stonefield]] to capture Solo at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. They are to trek across the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] until they reach the Palace, where they will stop and capture the renegade smuggler. During their trek, they are met by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]], who are quickly dispatched by Stonefield. As the hunters journey further into the desert, they are set upon by a sandstorm, and in turn, they erect a biosphere. But during the storm, they detect a ship landing near Jabba's Palace, and one of them sets out after it. The hunter encounters more Sand People, [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Monks]] and other danger, but eventually reaches Jabba's Palace. But the hunter is too late to apprehend Solo, and instead takes his quarry—Grubba. The hunter takes Grubba back to the biosphere, and Udin elects that they take him to [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]], for Solo to follow. ==Release and reception== ''The Hunt for Han Solo'' was released in the fifth ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' pack, which also included: *Star Wars Kids: The Magazine for Young Jedi Knights 5: {{ISBN|0-590-12792-6}} *Mission Team Cards (Set 5): {{ISBN|0-590-12802-7}}
